[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in freight logistics congestion index signals industrial sector pressure",
    "family": "freight_logistics",
    "data": {
      "source": "Freight congestion index weekly data via html_table adapter",
      "type": "scrape",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sharp weekly increase in freight congestion often precedes supply chain bottlenecks, slowing manufacturing output.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Industrial sector earnings rely heavily on smooth freight logistics; congestion constrains growth."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly congestion index rises more than 5% compared to prior week",
      "exit": "Once congestion index falls below 2% weekly change",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Freight congestion varies regularly with ongoing supply chain disruptions and seasonal factors."
  },
